---
title: "Gene set enrichment of non-orthologous genes"
---

The SVG file was copied over from the 2024-10-18 analysis. This file was then converted to a PDF with Inkscape.

```{r}
library(tidyverse)

gost_res <- readRDS("/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/icheong/CBL_scRNAseq/results/integrated/20241018/nonorth_human.rds")
```

Number of enriched pathways (FDR < 0.05)

```r
> nrow(gost_res$result)
[1] 345
```
